_doc: Drives check-gate-integrity.mjs (CANON-AUDIT-PROTOCOL §8.7a). Copy to tools/gate-integrity.config.json and point auditDir/gatePattern at YOUR gates. It refuses any gate that ships with no test, or a test that only checks the happy path — a gate never shown to go RED is false assurance. Skip-when-no-config: omit the file for a conscious N-A. §8.7b (required/blocking) is your branch-protection job, per-repo — not checked here.
